violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. The handles of the measuring scoops were stored in the powdered ingredients.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. Using a bag cooler for ice storage to make coffees. This is not a durable surface.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of hot cup lids was stored on the floor under the microwave.
